name: my-openclaw
description: AI coding agent with project isolation and team collaboration

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix ui"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix ui
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix ui
scripts.clean: npm run clean --prefix backend && npm run clean --prefix ui && rm -rf backend/dist ui/dist
